paywall.title: Premium required
paywall.body: Your free trial has ended. Upgrade to Premium to {reason}. Existing data keeps working regardless.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.lead: Bug, missing feature, anything broken — we read every message.
feedback.placeholderBug: What did you expect? What happened instead? Steps to reproduce help a lot.
feedback.placeholderSuggestion: What would make DataFast better for you?

share.title: Share this view
share.lead: Anyone with the link can view the dashboard read-only. Revoke at any time.
share.confirmRevoke: Revoke this share link? It will stop working immediately.
share.emptyState: No share links yet. Create one to give someone read-only access.

deleteSite.confirm: Remove "{name}"? Its views, layouts and segments will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

sites.title: Sites
sites.lead: Manage the DataFast-tracked websites connected to this dashboard.
sites.noSitesBody: Add your first DataFast website to start seeing analytics. You'll need an API key from Website Settings → API in your DataFast dashboard.
sites.noSitesReader: Ask an admin to add the first site for this organization.
sites.footNote: API keys are encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM. Back up data/master.key if you're using the auto-generated key.

organization.noOrgBody: Create one from the dropdown in the top bar to start adding sites and inviting teammates.
organization.inviteHint: They'll get an email with a link to accept. Invitations expire in 48 hours.
organization.confirmRemove: Remove {email} from {org}? They will lose access immediately.
organization.confirmLeave: Leave {org}? You'll lose access to its sites and dashboards.
organization.confirmDelete: Type the org slug to confirm deletion (this cannot be undone):
organization.leaveBody: You will lose access to all sites and dashboards in {org}.
organization.leaveDisabledTip: You're the only member — delete the organization instead.
organization.deleteBody: Permanently deletes the organization, its sites, views and segments. This cannot be undone.

billing.lead: One subscription per organization. Members with role {role} can manage it.
billing.toastCanceled: Checkout canceled. You can resume any time below.
billing.statusScheduledCancel: Scheduled to cancel on {date}. You'll keep access until then.
billing.statusPastDueBody: Update your card from the Stripe billing portal to restore access.
billing.statusTrialBody: Trial ends on {date}. Upgrade any time to keep adding sites and inviting teammates.
billing.statusTrialEndedBody: Subscribe to Premium to add sites or invite teammates.
billing.subscribeBody: One plan, unlocks unlimited sites and teammates for the org.
billing.manageBody: Update your card, download invoices, or change plan.
billing.cancelBody: Cancels at the end of the current period. No refund for the remaining days.
billing.confirmCancel: Cancel the subscription at the end of the current billing period? You'll keep access until then.
billing.resumeBody: The subscription is scheduled to cancel. Restore it to stay on Premium.

siteNew.title: Add a site
siteNew.cardBody: Paste the API key from Website Settings → API. The key is validated against /analytics/metadata and encrypted before it touches the disk.
siteNew.displayNamePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the name from DataFast

acceptInvite.missingBody: The link you used is incomplete. Ask the sender to forward the original email.
acceptInvite.notFoundBody: It may have been revoked or has already been accepted.
acceptInvite.alreadyBody: This link has already been used. Ask {email}'s inviter for a fresh one if you still need access.
acceptInvite.expiredBody: Invitations are valid for 48 hours. Ask for a new one.
acceptInvite.wrongAccountBody: This invitation was sent to {invited}, but you're signed in as {current}.
acceptInvite.wrongAccountHint: Sign out and sign in with the invited email, then reopen this link.

overview.description: Visitors, sessions, revenue, bounce rate, conversion, session duration — with period-over-period deltas.

referrers.description: External domains that sent you traffic.

campaigns.description: UTM & ref-tagged traffic grouped by campaign.
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet — tag your links with ?ref= or UTM params.

goals.description: Custom conversion goals, ranked by completions.

live.eventsDescription: Last 10 minutes of pageviews and events. Click a row to inspect the visitor.
live.paymentsDescription: Recent payments received in the last 10 minutes with new/renewal badges.

counter.description: Big number showing visitors active right now. Polls every 5s.
counter.activeSingular: visitor active in the last 5 min
counter.activePlural: visitors active in the last 5 min

trial.pastDue: Payment failed on your last Premium invoice. Update your card to keep adding sites and inviting teammates.
trial.ended: Trial ended. Upgrade to Premium to add sites or invite teammates.

segments.label: Segments
segments.noneYet: No saved segments yet. Apply filters and save them for one-click reuse.

widget.paletteLead: Pick one to drop it into your dashboard.

empty.canvas: Empty canvas — click + Add widget above to drop your first widget.
empty.noWidgets: No widgets yet. Switch to Edit mode to customize this view.
empty.welcomeBody: Add your first site to start seeing analytics across all your SaaS products.

login.description: Welcome back — sign in to continue.

signup.description: Start tracking your SaaS analytics in one place.
signup.sentBeforeEmail: We sent a verification link to

forgot.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sentAfterEmail: , we've sent a reset link. It expires in 1 hour.

verify.failedDescriptionBefore: The link is invalid or has expired (
verify.failedDescriptionAfter: ). Request a new one by signing up again or trying to log in.

hero.eyebrowText: Live payments feed — track MRR the moment it hits
hero.sub: More Data Fast is a dashboard layer on top of DataFast — assemble the widgets you actually read. KPIs, live events, revenue, cohorts. Dense, editorial, exportable. Built by one dev, for operators.
hero.meta1: Works with DataFast out of the box

value.label: Why
value.title1: DataFast gives you the data. MDF gives you the
value.lead: Three things your analytics tab won't do on its own.
value.card1Title: A dashboard that fits your head.
value.card1Body: Drag, drop, resize. Per-widget date ranges. Pin the six numbers you check at 9am; hide the ones you don't. Persistent across sessions, per site.
value.card2Body: Live events feed, live payments feed, crosshair-synced charts. See a checkout land while you're still reading the email that mentioned it.
value.card3Body: Tabular nums, 1px hairlines, JetBrains Mono on anything numeric. No marketing fluff between you and the number. Share read-only URLs with your co-founder.

showcase.label: Widgets
showcase.title: A widget library that feels like the CLI.
showcase.lead: Seven widget families, all wired to DataFast, all live.
showcase.copyTitle: Every widget is editable, resizable, and live.
showcase.copyBody: No templates. Start empty, add what you need, move it where it makes sense. The chrome stays out of the way.
showcase.item1Desc: 6-up numeric strip. Visitors, sessions, revenue, conv., bounce, session duration.
showcase.item2Desc: area chart with crosshair tooltips, dynamic ranges.
showcase.item5Desc: every pageview, signup, custom event — as it happens.
showcase.item6Desc: Stripe-connected; MRR the second it posts.

compare.label: vs DataFast alone
compare.title: What you get on top of the analytics you already have.
compare.lead: MDF sits beside DataFast, not instead of it. Events still ingest into DataFast; we add the dashboarding layer.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: One price. All widgets. All sites.
pricing.lead: Priced like a tool, not a platform. Cancel anytime.
pricing.copyTitle: Stop budgeting for seats you don't need.
pricing.copyBody: A flat price that covers every widget, every site, every team member. We built this for ourselves — the pricing reflects that.
pricing.bullet4: Cancel in one click from Settings
pricing.bullet5: Built by a solo dev who answers support himself
pricing.hintMonthly: billed monthly · vat excluded · cancel anytime
pricing.hintYearly: billed yearly · 2 months free · vat excluded · cancel anytime

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions we actually get.
faq.q1: Do I need a DataFast account first?
faq.a1: Yes. MDF reads from your existing DataFast workspace — it doesn't replace ingestion. Connect your API key in Settings and we'll pull the last 30 days automatically.
faq.a2: No free plan, but a full 14-day trial with every feature unlocked and no credit card required. If you hit day 14 and it's not for you, the dashboards just read-only until you upgrade.
faq.a3: Yes. MDF ships as a single Docker image with Postgres and a mounted data volume. Encryption keys live in data/master.key; you back those up, we don't hold them.
faq.a4: You keep read-only access until the end of your billing period, then your dashboards freeze. We don't delete anything — re-subscribe and everything comes back exactly as it was.
faq.a5: One developer. That's the whole team. Support emails get answered within 24h on weekdays; the product moves fast because there's no roadmap committee.
faq.q6: Will MDF get slower as my site scales?
faq.a6: Queries are cached and incrementally refreshed. We run the same dashboard on a site doing 2M events/month in ~800ms P95. If you're bigger than that, talk to us.

finalCta.sub: Plug in your DataFast workspace. Build a dashboard you actually check. Unsubscribe if we're not it.
finalCta.hint: from € 5 / mo · € 50 / year · cancel anytime · no card required
